column6: Static hold to release tight quads/psoas before loading.
Strengthens shin muscles prevents knee pain.
Loads quad while stretching psoas of rear leg. Knee over toe is safe here.
Rectus Femoris isolation. Squeeze hard at top.
Extreme quad stretch. Use support if needed.
Crucial for pelvic stability and often weak in men.
Rotational core power. Mimics BJJ torque patterns.
